description_long: This kiosk is a compact, modular commercial booth with a rectangular footprint and a partially open front. The structure is framed with metallic supports and enclosed by smooth, light-colored wall panels on three sides, while the front is open for access. A prominent orange canopy banner with white text reading 'A – 01 Engi World' extends above the entrance, providing clear identification. Inside, there is a central orange counter or platform leading toward the back wall, which features a printed sign with event and booth information. The rear and side walls are solid, with no visible windows or doors, and the roof is flat with a geometric black-and-white pattern. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for trade shows or urban pop-up events.
description: A modern, modular kiosk with a flat patterned roof, open front, solid side and rear walls, and a prominent orange canopy banner above the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, orange canopy banner, interior counter, and rear wall signage.
description_view_1: Side/rear view displaying the solid, light-colored wall panels and metallic frame, with no openings or signage visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the flat roof with a bold geometric black-and-white pattern and the open front.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view showing the continuous solid wall panels and part of the metallic frame.
attribute_signage_type: Printed banner above entrance with 'A – 01 Engi World' and a printed sign on the rear wall with event and booth details.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway at the front, no physical doors.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a geometric black-and-white patterned surface, no overhangs or skylights.
